title: Honeycomb Query Specification
description: Defines a query specification for retrieving and aggregating data in Honeycomb. Queries are used across boards, triggers, SLOs, and query annotations.

calculations.description: The calculations (aggregations) to perform on the query data.

filters.description: Filters to apply to events before aggregation.

filter_combination.description: How to combine multiple filters. Defaults to AND.

breakdowns.description: Column names to group results by.

orders.description: Ordering rules for the query results.

havings.description: Post-aggregation filters applied to calculated results.

time_range.description: The relative time range in seconds to query over.

start_time.description: Unix timestamp for the absolute query start time.

end_time.description: Unix timestamp for the absolute query end time.

granularity.description: The time granularity of results in seconds.

limit.description: Maximum number of result rows to return.

column.description: The column to perform the calculation on. Not required for COUNT.

Filter.description: A filter condition applied to events.

column.description: The column name to filter on.

value.description: The value to compare against. Not required for exists/does-not-exist operators.

Order.description: An ordering rule for query results.

op.description: The aggregation operation to order by, if ordering by a calculation.

Having.description: A post-aggregation filter applied to calculated results.

calculate_op.description: The calculation operation this having clause applies to.

column.description: The column the calculation is performed on.

value.description: The value to compare the calculated result against.
